items.mistake: Running feature selection on the entire dataset before train/test split
items.fix: Fit selectors (MI, RFE, Lasso) inside cross-validation folds on training data only; apply the fitted selector to validation/test.
items.why: Using label statistics from test rows leaks target information into feature ranks and inflates reported performance.
items.example: Wrap `SelectKBest` in `Pipeline` with `cross_val_score` so each fold's selector sees only its training fold.

items.mistake: Assuming the top MI features are optimal for every model
items.fix: Treat filters as priors; confirm subset quality with the actual estimator and held-out metrics.
items.why: A filter measures marginal dependence; tree models and linear models exploit different interaction structure.
items.example: MI may rank feature A highest, but RFE with RandomForest keeps B and C because they interact for the forest splits.

items.mistake: Using RFE with unscaled linear models on mixed-scale features
items.fix: Standardize continuous columns (or use a `Pipeline` with `StandardScaler`) before RFE with coefficient-based ranking.
items.why: Larger-scale features get larger coefficients even when they are not more informative, skewing elimination order.
items.example: Income in dollars vs age in years: without scaling, RFE may drop age first because |coef_income| dominates by scale.
